title: Legal notice
metaDescription: REPUTEXA legal notice: publisher, hosting (LCEN art. 6), processors, Impressum, CNIL, EU consumer mediation, intellectual property.
intro:
In accordance with French law no. 2004-575 of 21 June 2004 on confidence in the digital economy (LCEN) and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), this legal notice identifies the publisher of reputexa.fr, technical processors, contact details and remedies. It is designed to be read together with the privacy policy (Loyalty & Reviews) and the terms of use.

Last updated: April 2026 — version 1.3.
editeur_content: The reputexa.fr website is published by REPUTEXA, a company in the process of incorporation or incorporated in France (legal form, exact name, registered office address, SIREN/SIRET number, intra-EU VAT number where applicable: to be completed upon incorporation and displayed at the top of this section). Until then: professional contact details: contact@reputexa.fr. Share capital: to be stated after incorporation where applicable.
impressum_content: In accordance with applicable requirements in Germany (§ 5 TMG) and in the European Union, the Impressum reproduces the publisher information above (name, registered office, contact). These legal notices serve as the Impressum for all users, including those located in Germany. Contact: contact@reputexa.fr.
directeur_content: The publication director is the natural person identified as such with the host and the competent authority (founder / legal representative of REPUTEXA). Name and capacity: to be completed after the company is formed.
hebergeur_content: In accordance with Article 6-I-2° of the LCEN, the following is specified. Web application (front end and API): Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, United States — website and legal notices: vercel.com/legal; deployment may be operated via the European entity Vercel Netherlands B.V. depending on your billing region. Application data (PostgreSQL database, authentication, storage associated with the project): Supabase — project configured in the European Union region (eu-*) when available; privacy policy and DPA: supabase.com. Transactional email: Resend — resend.com/legal. Payments: Stripe Payments Europe Ltd or applicable Stripe entity depending on your country — stripe.com/legal. WhatsApp messaging (Zenith plan / alerts): Twilio Inc. or applicable subsidiary — twilio.com/legal. AI providers (text suggestions): OpenAI / Anthropic depending on configured API keys — processing governed by those vendors’ terms and DPAs. Sub-processors are contractually bound to confidentiality and data security (GDPR, Art. 28). Merchant account data are in principle hosted in the EU; some processing (e.g. AI APIs) may involve transfers subject to appropriate safeguards (standard contractual clauses, vendor policies). Details: Privacy policy. AI-based features may produce errors; generated content is indicative — see Terms of Use (Article 5) and Privacy policy (Section 8).
droit_content: The applicable law is French law. Without prejudice to mandatory provisions of the user’s country of residence within the European Union, these notices and the site are governed by French law. Consumers residing in the EU retain the rights granted to them by the mandatory provisions of their Member State of residence.
prop_intel_content: The REPUTEXA platform, the SaaS software (features, code, architecture, related documentation) and all site content (texts, graphics, logos, databases) are the exclusive property of REPUTEXA and are protected by copyright, trademark law and related rights. Any reproduction, representation or exploitation without authorisation constitutes infringement and may give rise to legal action.
liens_content: The site may contain links to third-party sites. REPUTEXA exercises no control over those sites and disclaims all liability for their content. Creating links to reputexa.fr requires the prior consent of the publisher.
cnil_content: For any question relating to personal data, you may contact: contact@reputexa.fr. You have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (French Data Protection Authority), 3 Place de Fontenoy — TSA 80715 — 75334 PARIS CEDEX 07, France — www.cnil.fr — if you consider that the processing of your data does not comply with the GDPR. If you reside in another EU Member State, you may contact the data protection authority of your country.
mediation_content: In accordance with Articles L.612-1 et seq. of the French Consumer Code, any consumer has the right to refer free of charge to a consumer mediator with a view to the amicable settlement of a dispute with a professional. After a prior written approach to REPUTEXA that has remained unsuccessful, the consumer may refer the competent mediator whose identity will be specified on this page once the scheme is formalised (or the sectoral or general mediator to which REPUTEXA belongs). EU online dispute resolution platform (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/
contact_content: For any question relating to this legal notice: contact@reputexa.fr.
